title: This NEW NotebookLM Update Changes Everything
summary: Google's NotebookLM has been upgraded to function as a full AI agent capable of writing code, building sources, and delivering finished outputs autonomously. New features include a cloud computer for handling code and documents, auto-source building from initial ideas, and a Studio for generating podcasts and reports with cited answers.
writeup: The video covers a NotebookLM update that turns the tool into an AI agent able to write code, build sources, and deliver finished outputs on its own. It walks through the new cloud computer for handling code and documents, auto-source building that starts from an initial idea, and a Studio for generating podcasts and reports with cited answers. The shift matters because it moves NotebookLM from a research assistant toward autonomous task completion across code and document work.
